mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notification (user_type, user_id, phone, type, title, content, status, send_time) VALUES (#{userType}, #{userId}, #{phone}, #{type}, #{title}, #{content}, #{status}, #{sendTime})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM notification WHERE user_type = #{userType} AND user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{size}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM notification WHERE user_type = #{userType} AND user_id = #{userId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM notification WHERE user_type = #{userType} AND user_id = #{userId} AND status = 1
mapper.update: UPDATE notification SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
